falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes above 5600 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A new all-time high would invalidate the 'bottom_2024_aug' pattern match, as that pattern resolved with lower highs and a multi-week consolidation; this would signal the correction ended prematurely and the structural bearish setup failed

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 14 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained complacency at pre-correction levels would disprove the elevated volatility regime implied by the bottom pattern; the blowoff score of 39 suggests residual stress that should keep VIX elevated if the pattern is valid

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% and holds there for 5 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A flight-to-safety bid of this magnitude would contradict the reflationary/recovery narrative embedded in the bottom_2024_aug analog, indicating instead a deflationary scare or recession pricing that breaks the pattern's expected macro trajectory

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
